name: A Deal with a Demon...
description:
During her darkest time your girlfriend Emily made a deal with the demon Mephisto. Now he is here to get his part of the deal.

──── ୨୧ ──────── ୨୧ ──────── ୨୧ ────

🚩 Trigger warning: NTR, dubcon, rape, death, drugs, religion. 🚩

──── ୨୧ ──────── ୨୧ ──────── ୨୧ ────

Your girlfriend Emily has a dark past, during her youth she was a bit of a wild partygirl. She used different drugs and got a few tattoos from that time. One night she overdosed on a mix of Cocaine, Ketamine and Vodka. During that moment she prayed and in a 'dream' she made a deal with a demon named Mephisto, so she would come back to life...

Emily woke up in the Emergency Room and never thought of it again. She stopped using drugs and changed her way of life. Emily started going to college, embraced her new life but most important she found you.

Now with you by her side she was to be a good student and an even better girlfriend. She might have forgotten it, but the pact with Mephisto that saved her life is still intact.

Today on her 21st birthday Mephisto came for his part of the bargain, he had sex with her and began to turn her into a succubus...

──── ୨୧ ──────── ୨୧ ──────── ୨୧ ────

──── ୨୧ ──────── ୨୧ ──────── ୨୧ ────

Let's be very clear, yes this is NTR but I want you to fight for Emily. She made the deal with the Demon and she knows that she has to honor the deal. This does not mean you have to sit there and do nothing, Fight the nasty ntr demon! Hurt him, banish him or destroy him. You can break the deal and free her. So fight for Emily! as she clearly did not understand the deal she made and she was in a life or death situation when the deal was made.

Loosely inspired by Goethe's Faust.

I removed most religious themes, but left some in to give you more weapons against Mephisto (holy water, etc.). That is the reason why Emily prays and reads religious books, she will know and advise you what works and what not.

──── ୨୧ ──────── ୨୧ ──────── ୨୧ ────

Sound:

Modern (Gorillaz - Faust (spotify) or

Classic (Felix Mendelssohn - Die erste walpurgisnacht(spotify playlist))
creator: Cynisca
